summary: End-to-end verification of 3 critical fixes: (1) AdminPage React crash, (2) Header anchor link navigation, (3) Leaflet/OpenStreetMap on PropertyDetailPage. All fixes verified working. Backend pytest: 13/17 passing (4 quote failures are external Guesty 'LISTING_NOT_AVAILABLE' responses with proper structured 400 errors — acceptable per review spec).

minor.issue: Returns 400 LISTING_NOT_AVAILABLE for tested listings — external Guesty availability calendar issue, not a code bug. Backend returns structured error correctly. Consider adding a seeded always-available test listing for CI.

backend_pytest.failures_breakdown: All 4 failures (test_create_quote, test_get_quote, test_quote_pricing, test_create_checkout_session) are due to external Guesty BEAPI returning LISTING_NOT_AVAILABLE for tested listings/dates. Backend wraps this correctly as structured 400 error: {code: LISTING_NOT_AVAILABLE}.

action_items: Optional: Provide a known-available seeded listing or extend test fixtures to dynamically pick an available listing for quote/checkout regression tests, so the suite is fully green in CI.
critical_code_review_comments: blocks.js correctly uses lucide-react component references for all 33+ block schema icons — no emoji strings remain in icon fields.
App.js ScrollToHash component correctly handles location.hash with 80ms timeout and behavior:'smooth'.
PropertyDetailPage uses react-leaflet MapContainer with OpenStreetMap tile.openstreetmap.org tiles — no Google Maps iframe.
Header.jsx ownerDropdownItems now point Portfolio to /properties (correct).
Backend /api/quotes returns proper structured errors (DATES_IN_PAST, LISTING_NOT_AVAILABLE) — recommended pattern.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_api.py (dynamic dates relative to today to avoid DATES_IN_PAST)

success_rate.backend: 76% (13/17, 4 failures are external Guesty availability — not code)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All three reported fixes (admin crash, header anchors, Leaflet map) are stable end-to-end. Quote API failures in pytest are external Guesty availability behavior, not regressions. If real bookings need to be tested, query /api/listings first and pick a listing whose calendar is open.
